response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable full-stack and backend engineer with strong fundamentals and genuine high-scale experience at Sociomantic, but his profile does not align with the core requirements of this role. The position demands deep expertise in experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, and statistical analysis workflows — none of which appear in the resume. His seniority is at the Staff/Senior band, not Principal/IC6, and his most recent substantive engagement was only six months long followed by an active career gap. The role requires demonstrated cross-team platform ownership and growth systems leadership that are absent from his experience.
strengths: Genuine high-scale distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, async I/O design
Broad language portfolio spanning JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, C#, Java, and DLang, covering most of the required stack
Consistent track record of technical community contribution — workshops, open source libraries, and conference talks — indicating communication and mentoring capability
concerns: Zero demonstrable experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management, which are the core deliverables of this role
No evidence of telemetry, metrics instrumentation, or data-driven growth work; data aptitude requirement is unaddressed
Active career gap since October 2025 and a prior role of only six months, raising questions about trajectory and readiness for a Principal IC6 scope
